title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Goa Tourism - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Goa Tourism - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Goa Tourism is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Gurgaon. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Goa Tourism:
Goa Tourism is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goa Tourism!
